name: Ammunition
description: Requires ammunition to make a ranged attack. Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack. Spent ammunition can be recovered after battle (half of it, rounded down).

name: Finesse
description: When attacking with this weapon, use either STR or DEX for the attack and damage rolls (your choice).

name: Heavy
description: Small creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls with Heavy weapons.

name: Light
description: Can be used for Two-Weapon Fighting.

name: Loading
description: You can fire only one piece of ammunition when you use an action, bonus action, or reaction to fire it, regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make.

name: Range
description: Has a normal and long range. Attacking beyond normal range imposes Disadvantage. Attacking beyond long range is impossible.

name: Reach
description: Adds 5 feet to your reach for attacks with this weapon, including Opportunity Attacks.

name: Thrown
description: Can be thrown to make a ranged attack. Uses the same ability modifier as the melee attack. Has a normal and long range.

name: Two-Handed
description: Requires two hands to make an attack.

name: Versatile
description: Can be wielded with one or two hands. The two-handed damage die is given in parentheses.
